name: UKG Pro API
what_it_does: UKG Pro API provides REST access to UKG's unified HCM and workforce management platform covering employees, payroll, time and attendance, benefits, and talent management, with particular strength in hourly workforce industries.
use_cases: Syncing employee time and attendance data to payroll processing systems
Automating shift scheduling and workforce forecasting for hourly workers
Integrating UKG employee records with third-party benefits administration
Pulling real-time labor analytics for manufacturing and retail operations
Automating onboarding workflows across HRIS and IT provisioning systems
Building compliance reporting for wage and hour regulations
not_for: Small businesses (enterprise pricing and minimum seat requirements)
Companies primarily employing salaried knowledge workers (product optimized for hourly/shift work)
Developers without workforce management domain knowledge
Lightweight integrations that don't justify the implementation complexity
best_when: Managing large hourly workforces in manufacturing, retail, healthcare, or logistics where time and attendance accuracy and compliance are critical
avoid_when: Your workforce is primarily remote/salaried knowledge workers, you need a modern developer-first API experience, or you're building a startup MVP

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 client credentials and authorization code flows; API keys available for server-to-server; SSO integration with enterprise IdPs via SAML; service account setup required for agent integrations

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee annual enterprise licensing; pricing varies significantly by module set and employee count
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only contracts; API access included with platform license; sandbox/test environment provisioning requires sales engagement

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply but specific values are not publicly documented; batch processing recommended for bulk operations

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST error responses use standard HTTP codes but error body detail is inconsistent across API versions; some endpoints return HTML error pages instead of JSON
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations are safe; writes require careful duplicate handling; no standardized idempotency key support across all endpoints
known_agent_gotchas: API surface is split across UKG Pro (formerly Ultipro) and UKG Dimensions (formerly Kronos) — different base URLs and auth
UKG Pro and UKG Ready are separate products with separate APIs — verify which product the customer uses
Time and attendance data models are complex with org hierarchy, pay rules, and accrual policies
Employee ID systems often differ between HRIS and time/attendance modules requiring mapping
Payroll processing endpoints trigger real payroll runs — test carefully in sandbox
Webhook reliability has been reported as inconsistent by integration partners
Documentation lags behind product releases by weeks to months
Rate limit behavior is not well documented and varies by endpoint
Employee PII including payroll data requires elevated OAuth scopes and careful handling

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II certified; HIPAA BAA available for healthcare customers; enterprise SSO via SAML; comprehensive audit logging; handles sensitive payroll PII
